business_summary: SK hynix Inc. research, develops manufactures, and sells semiconductor devices in Korea, China, rest of Asia, the United States, and Europe. It offers DRAM, NAND storage, SSD, MCP, and CMM products. The company provides its products for server, networking, mobile, personal computer, consumer, and automotive applications. It is also involved in the construction, business support, industrial material distribution, semiconductor apparel manufacturing, baking, hospital, education, information and communication, investment, and money trust activities. The company was formerly known as Hynix Semiconductor Inc. and changed its name to SK hynix Inc. in March 2012. SK hynix Inc. was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Icheon-si, South Korea.

acquisition_detected.message: Revenue saltó 102% en 2024 (32,765,719M → 66,192,960M). Probable adquisición — datos de Yahoo pueden ser parciales (no pro-forma). Crecimiento ajustado a tasas orgánicas (2-6%).
